title: AetherMon
description: A datapack that lets Cobblemons spawn in aether and have tms from TmCraft spawn naturally in aether dungeons.
body: A datapack for compatibility between Aether and Cobblemon (and TmCraft, if you've got it installed). You can check who's spawning in the aether by opening the datapack, tms can only be found in aether dungeons (not in other structure generated by other mod addons).
